name: Heart of the Ancients
description: Heart of the Ancients is an Eridian E-tech relic in Borderlands 2. It is exclusive to Ultimate Vault Hunter Mode and only drops from Legendary Loot Midgets.

special.description: Grants a damage boost for one weapon category, which can roll as Assault Rifle, Pistol, Rocket Launcher, Shotgun, SMG, Sniper Rifle, or other weapon types. It also includes Tenacity-style bonuses, increasing Fight For Your Life duration and/or the health restored on Second Wind. In effect, it merges Aggression and Tenacity relic traits into a single item.

abilities: Improves weapon damage and second wind capability. SOOIDIGIOIGI2
